question: Describe the structure of the main steam and feedwater plenum.

nuscale_ch05_0025.title: References
nuscale_ch05_0025.summary: This section details the materials used in the construction of the pressurizer and its components within the NuScale reactor coolant system. It specifies the types of steel and alloys used for various parts, their protective claddings, and compliance with relevant BPVC material specifications to ensure corrosion resistance and compatibility with operating environments.

nuscale_ch05_0020.title: Steam Generators
nuscale_ch05_0020.summary: The steam generators (SGs) in the NuScale Power Module are integrated within the reactor pressure vessel (RPV), which also houses other key components such as the pressurizer and safety valves. The SG system includes feedwater and main steam piping, plenum access ports, and thermal relief valves, with the RPV itself forming the outer pressure boundary for the SGs and contributing to the reactor coolant pressure boundary.

nuscale_ch05_0013.title: References
nuscale_ch05_0013.summary: This section lists references and standards used in the NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report regarding the integrity of the reactor coolant boundary. It includes guidelines and reports from the Electric Power Research Institute and the American Society of Mechanical Engineers, as well as tables summarizing relevant ASME code cases for reactor components.

nuscale_ch05_0019.title: Reactor Coolant System Component and Subsystem Design
nuscale_ch05_0019.summary: This section describes the design of the NuScale Power Module’s Reactor Coolant System (RCS) components and subsystems, including the reactor pressure vessel, steam generators, safety valves, and associated piping. It outlines the integration of these components within the reactor vessel and specifies the boundaries between the primary and secondary sides, emphasizing the role of the steam generators as integral parts of the RCS pressure boundary.

edges.description: Section A provides detailed material and component information about the pressurizer, which is one of the subsystems described in the broader system overview of Section B.

Section A references Section B by indicating that the material of the RPV upper shell and upper head, which are part of the pressurizer structure, is described in Section 5.2, where Section B provides relevant material standards and guidelines.

Section A provides detailed descriptions of specific pressurizer components and their materials, which are referenced in Section B's broader overview of the reactor coolant system and its subsystems, including the pressurizer.

Section A describes the components and design of the reactor coolant system, including steam generators, while Section B lists references that provide supporting standards and guidelines relevant to the integrity and quality assurance of those components.

Section A provides references and standards that underpin the design and quality assurance requirements described in Section B's detailed explanation of the reactor coolant system components, including the main steam and feedwater plenum.
